entry.title: New Applicant Management Workbench - Universal in 1H 2024?
entry.content:
Hi,

Clarity needed on whether or not the previously communicated Universal change to the New Applicant Management Workbench will go ahead in 1H 2024, where it will be defaulted for all users with no possibility to opt out? Understood that it will still be possible to toggle back to the old version on a user by user basis, however where there are a huge volume of users e.g. 1,500 Hiring Managers impacted in Retail, a robust communication plan is needed and must be put in motion now.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite – Access Policies for Integration Packages
entry.content:
Hi,

is there a specific reason that the "Match" Operator cannot be used for Access Policies of Integration Packages? 
This kind of operator can be used in all other Access Policies! Based on this it's currently required to create for each package an individual Access Policy, what makes no sense from my point of view. 

Regards
Joern

entry.title: Re: Activity Types and Service Materials for Project Based Services and Project Billing
entry.content:
Hi David,

thanks a lot! It worked now 🙂

Best regards

Anja

entry.title: Re: Datasphere - shared view is not available in Database
entry.content: Unfortunately its throwing error that ‘couldn’t find table/view’

entry.title: Re: Can we create complex transactional FIORI apps using...
entry.content: It is not a stupid idea. The whole development of SAP S/4HANA is based on the ABAP RESTful application programming model now.

entry.title: PRD: Unable to convert UTC timezone to specific Timezone
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Good day! Badly needed help as I am unable to convert the UTC time zone from PRD to specific timezone when report has been imported in LMS.

I already follow this KBA but it still doesnt fix my problem. https://me.sap.com/notes/2747000

I have used both event handler and conversion query but to no avail 😞

When I run preview results via PRD it is showing the correct timezone but when I already imported the file in LMS then run the report it is still showing the UTC timezone.

Example: 

Preview Result in PRD: Completion Date: April 8, 2:00 AM

Running the Report in LMS: Completion Date: April 7, 6:00 PM

Completion Date of the User in the UI: April 8, 2:00 AM

 

Please advise! Attaching the PRD query for assistance. Thank you so much Experts

Best Regards,

Wayne

entry.title: Re: Can we create complex transactional FIORI apps using...
entry.content:
RAP can certainly be used to build complex applications as you can see from several large applications.

SAP S/4HANA development has been completely moved to the ABAP RESTful application programming model.

1. Complex validation and determinations can be used if your RAP application uses the draft concept. Here you can validate the data before it is actually persisted.

2. From what you describe your implementation is a brownfield implementation and would either have to use a managed implementation with unmanaged save or an umanaged implementation where the developer has to take care of all create, update and delete statements.

Unmanaged Save | SAP Help Portal

3. As of 2023 you can also model side-effects already in the backend. In older SAP S/4HANA releases side effects can also be used, but have to be modelled on SAPUI5 side. Side effects allow for responsive UI's.

Side Effects | SAP Help Portal

4. When a Fiori Elements List report template does not suite your needs there is always the possibility to build a SAPUI5 app based on a code based implementation.

entry.title: SAC trail versions
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have register for the SAC trail version. Once i tried to login not able login. Here is screen shot for the same.

Kind Regards,

Sandeep S

entry.title: Re: How to get User Image on BTP Launchpad from "Microsof...
entry.content:
Hi kirtipawar, 

You have got any Solution for 401 unauthorized Error or to Get the user image directly from Microsoft office 365 without login to Outlook in the next tab.

Thanks,

Sunitha Hari

entry.title: Re: Datasphere - shared view is not available in Database
entry.content:
I don't know if the "expose by default" option in the space configuration affects the views shared with this one, but if you have it activated and you don't see it, you can always create a new view in the SPACE B that reads from shared view, and then expose the new view.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: COPA - Account Based and Costing Based
entry.content:
Hi @KrishnaSB 

I would ask the rationale behind the same. What are the reporting requirements which are filled by Costing based COPA , which are not available with account based COPA. There is no such requirement that both are required. In my view it should strictly be driven by business requirements. Also note that with Universal Parallel Accounting (UPA) available in recent releases, there have been few innovations around Margin Analysis, which you might find useful. You might find the below blog as a very good starting point:

Universal Parallel Accounting in SAP S/4HANA - SAP Community

Thanks & Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP error " Handler not implemented; Method: INS...
entry.content: <delete>

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account and getting started in the community
entry.content: Good day, my name is Benjamin, I am from Germany and I am interested in the SAP beginner course

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP error " Handler not implemented; Method: INS...
entry.content: I am just following these steps https://github.com/SAP-samples/abap-platform-rap100/tree/main/exercises/ex07 but from what I see in this table is that it is being updated once I activate the handler class. So it does not seem to require an additional step to update this table. If I create the method for the Instance Feature it updates automatically.

entry.title: Re: How to create API to consume SAP B1 Service Layer in...
entry.content:
Hi,

if you define the B1 service layer as your destination -you should consume  B1 Service Layer  from the BTP.
When configuring the B1 service layer as your destination on BTP, make sure to utilize basic authentication in your destination configuration.

entry.title: Re: Datasphere - shared view is not available in Database
entry.content:
Well, actually i need the shared view visible in DB explorer as my actual requirement is to access this view from the shared space in Power BI ODBC.

its a security requirement that i need to share a view to another space (Business self-service) and let users acccess it from there..

entry.title: Re: SAP Webcasts / Online Workshops
entry.content:
Hi,

for SAP Datasphere please check the Community Page regularly.

https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/datasphere

e.g. in section What's New (Upcoming Events) or Learning. 

BR Gordon.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to configure the min and max memory al...
entry.content: Thank you kindly sir.

entry.title: Re: sap business one account nature
entry.content:
The existence of different Drawers in the Chart of Accounts of SAP Business One is the way to organize and provide sums and subtotals of the General Ledger Accounts in the Financial Report Templates. The reports are presented according to the accounting practices to present Balance Sheet, and Profit and Loss

Depending on the localization, The company comes already with a preset Chart of Accounts.

I recommend to review the Training 'B1_FinSetup_LM_EN_10_01' in Learning Hub, see 'Chart of Accounts Concepts'. For a detailed explanation.

Hope this helps

entry.title: Re: Can we create complex transactional FIORI apps using...
entry.content: Due to the fact that the http connection is stateless the draft has to be managed on the frontend or it has to be managed in the database. The first case is bad since all the validation information is on server side. The second case is bad since you store records in DB that have to be deleted later. This concept is not elegant and destroys the possibility to create applications using a MVC model. MVC was possible with WebDynpro and is perfectly possible with SAPGUI. But it is not possible with UI5. The draft concept was not existing in the very beginning of UI5. So obviously SAP didn't realize that there is a problem at all in the beginning. UI5 is simply not mature and it will be probably never. SAP makes everything new but worse than before. I cannot understand this strategy.

entry.title: Can I call two API in SAP Build App (Process Automate and Application Backend)
entry.content:
I have two codes here that call an API:
- for database/Application backend: "data.RequestInformation1.foodCourtType"
- Process Automate: "data["SBPA Request Trigger1"].requestInfo.FoodCourtType"

Each of these are set to be inside a same component (input field)

How can I call these two codes at the same time?

entry.title: How to seach in SAP Community?
entry.content:
Hi, 

After having created dozens of websites, and a couple of communities with thousands of users, I find myself unable to use SAP Community fluently.

I want to find information on how to use a particular functionality of an SAP product.
There is no "channel", "site", "group" or anything similar to the product, it is in a global "Technology Q&A" group with many, many other products.
To make up for this lack, we are supposed to have the TAGs, ok that's what there is.

But how do I search for something filtering also by tag?

 

I don't have time to read 300,000 posts 😄

if I add the name of the product to the search, it returns first those that contain the word in the title ... so it does not serve to filter correctly.

At least I have reduced the result to 1000 ... but still too many to read.

any ideas? it can't be that hard, I must be missing something.

Regards,

entry.title: Expose CDS View as OData Service/API in S/4HANA 2002 On-Premise
entry.content:
I am new to CDS / Odata services.

I have created a very basic CDS View in eclipse (with ADT) for our S/4HANA 2022 On-Premise system. The CDS view displays data from a standard SAP table. I can run the service in the browser as an app and display the data.

I would like to also run this as an external API. How can I achieve this? Assuming I need to create a service definition, then a service binding? What type of service binding? Is there another step needed after this to create and find the API service url?

entry.title: Re: Datasphere - shared view is not available in Database
entry.content:
yes, you have the A SPACE where original view is allocated. Shared with B SPACE where the users wan to consume that view.
To allow access from B SPACE SQL Schema, you need to expose the view in that space.

Is the shared view is not exposed automatically then you can create in B SPACE a new view reading from the shared one, and then activate the "expose" in that view to be published in SQL of the B SPACE.

entry.title: Re: Fill data in multiple reports by executing 1 function...
entry.content:
Hi,

You can automate this process so that the other reports/views will also be updated whenever you update this function. You can use InsightZAP (a vendor software) to automate business processes without code.

entry.title: Re: Test Script Download Error in SAP Signavio Process Na...
entry.content: As info to the community, I have an OSS on this issue (since last Thursday) being currently "In porcessing by SAP".

entry.title: Re: Can I delete any Resource line from product tree by S...
entry.content:
Hi mucipilbuga,

Kindly refer to the following blog post: SAP Business One Service Layer: Entity CRUD - Update

The blog discusses about the header B1S-ReplaceCollectionsOnPatch=true which you need to use for your scenario.

This header supports removing an element in the collection.

Header B1S-ReplaceCollectionsOnPatch=true sets the update method as REPLACE, which means the whole content will be replaced and the mismatched old rows will be deleted.

In case of any issue, please do not hesitate to write us back.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Datasphere - shared view is not available in Database
entry.content: Yes the original view in space A is already exposed for consumption but Space B database user not able to access it in db explorer , and same in odbc power bi. That’s the issue, i do not want to create another view on top of original view in space B. Its a security design limitation i have..

entry.title: Re: Practical Insights into New Features of SAP EWM in S/4HANA 2023
entry.content:
We are still waiting for the EWM integration with PSM and DIMP. There is still no integration for MRO subcontracting, in house repair orders and installation and dismantling in an EWM supported warehouse. And there is also no logical cost center derivation when booking a difference in goods receipt. We hope that in the further development of synchronous goods movement SAP will take care of this integration topics.

Marcel Koumans

entry.title: CDS view entity giving annotation error
entry.content:
I created a simple CDS view entity and for unknown reasons, it is giving me annotation errors such as 'Annotation 'AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory' used at wrong position (wrong scope)'.

So, I created another CDS view entity with a different name (but in the same package) and exactly the same query, and it activated without any errors.

I have attached a screenshot of the two CDS view entities below:

Kindly help in resolving this weird issue.

entry.title: Re: SAP GTM-Error occured in Profit Simulation
entry.content: HI Tuncay,

entry.title: EWM PPF Action - Where can I execute custom ABAP code to trigger EWM PPF after a WO is confirmed.
entry.content:
The EWM WO status is only set to 'C'onfirmed  after a  'COMMIT WORK and WAIT' is executed .  There are no suitable BADI's available after this for me to trigger the PPF.  I need a spot/BADI after the WO is confirmed to automatically execute my custom code for the PPF.

(FYI- the PPF has custom code to create and send and outbound IDOC to a 3rd party system)

entry.content: In addition to @Joselito 's answer, I can also recommend chapter 3: "The Basics of Financial Accounting" in SAP Business One To Go manual

entry.title: Re: SAP GTM-Error occured in Profit Simulation
entry.content: Hello Tuncay, Thanks a lot for your reply by giving all the related notes and inputs. I am checking further to resolve the issue. I will get back to you with an update to complete the contract. Thanks again.

entry.title: Reports CPE - SAP Sustainability Control Tower
entry.content:
Hi!

I have a model in CPE, I have created a process template, I have activated each step of the model and I have created a report. I created this report by clicking the "Reports" button from the "Modeling" section. However, from the "Process" section, when I click on my process template, the "Reports" button is activated, but when I click on it, the previous report does not appear and the options to create and delete are not activated.

 

Why is it that if I access the reports from the modeling screen, the created report appears and the options are enabled, but when I am on the processes screen, they do not?

 

Thank you!

entry.title: sap ai launchpad add application error
entry.content:
Hi,

when I try to add a application in sap ai launchpad, it shows the error: 

Failed to load target state: failed to generate manifest for source 1 of 1: rpc error: code = Unknown desc = Get "https://github.wdf.sap.corp/myRepository/tree/master/info/refs?service=git-upload-pack": dial tcp: lookup github.wdf.sap.corp on 100.64.0.10:53: no such host.

I tried to use id, emailname as user name and generate toke on git, however, same error shows.

any expert can help me?

entry.title: Re: Datasphere - shared view is not available in Database
entry.content:
This is not an issue.

You defined the original view as exposed in SPACE A, ok, this is something related to SAPCE A over an object of SPACE A.

Then you shared it to SPACE B, and it's here in SPACE B where you must define the security of the object in SPACE B. if it is exposed or not to the SQL of SPACE B. Something defined in the SPACE A (as exposed attr) can't overwrite the security of the SPACE B.
So to define the usage in the SPACE B, create an object in SPACE B and manage it.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Datasphere - shared view is not available in Database
entry.content:
I agree, that’s the ideal way to deal this case.

shared object purpose in datasphere is defeating i believe. The purpose of shared object is that other space can consume the object as it is without need to create it. If it is accessible at only shared space application layer but not available in shared space database schema, then i see some gap.

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: How to call class in BW transformations
entry.content:
Dear BW Experts,

It will be great, if you share some sample code on how to call class in BW transformations of the AMDP method.

THanks,

entry.title: Handling Third Party Cookies Deprecation in Identity Authentication
entry.content:
Background

A while ago Google announced the deprecation of third-party cookies for the Chrome-based browsers (Prepare for third-party cookie restrictions ). Starting Q1 2024, 1% of all browsers already have their third party cookies usage deprecated with the goal to completely phase out the old way of using cookies by mid-Q3 2024.

The Affected

As a result, certain sign-in scenarios concerning Single Sign-On (SSO) may be affected. Deprecating the traditional way of cookie usage means that browsers will automatically block cookies from applications embedded in inline frame (iframe), for example, thus braking sign-in flows. As Identity Authentication is often embedded on top-level pages, it had to ensure the SSO flow will continue to function. There are a couple of solutions that the administrators can implement after the start of the deprecation period.

The Solutions

Cookies Having Independent Partitioned State (CHIPS)

In this scenario, embedded applications can set partitioned cookies that can be used only on the current top-level site. The implementation of CHIPS depends on the developers of the given applications. The application has to be extended to support it. You can read more about that in Cookies Having Independent Partitioned State (CHIPS).

Storage Access API

This is also what Identity Authentication currently uses and supports. Read more at Storage Access API.

In the typical sign-in flow, the embedded application requests storage access permissions to the browser. Upon sign-in attempt, the user sees the following message: Once Continue is chosen, a request is triggered, asking the browser to present the possibility to allow access to cookies. The prompt is similar to the one below:
If access is allowed, the sign-in flow continues.

If denied, the sign-in flow of the embedded Identity Authentication sign-in screen is broken and no signing in is possible. The user sees the following message:

In another scenario, Identity Authentication can be used in a pure proxy mode. In this situation the browser of the user might have never interacted with the SAP (ondemand.com) domain. As a result, the browser blocks the iframed domain until the user interacts with it separately on a top-level.

To resolve this, Identity Authentication redirects the users to a separate page, where they have to perform some kind of interaction, so that the top-level domain of the page is considered "familiar" to the browser. This interaction is as simple as the confirmation to the message below:

In some situations this might cause confusion, since with the proxy mode configuration the users might not even know they are signing in via Identity Authentication, or that SAP is involved in the sign-in flow at all. However, there was no other option to work around the limitation than sending the user to a separate confirmation page. Once the interaction is done, the users longer need to perform this step.

Deprecation Trial

Google Offering

For customers that would require more time to implement changes on their application, Google offers a grace period. During this grace period, an opt-out of the new way of handling cookies is possible. Customers can obtain their deprecation trial tokens from Google upon request. You can read more at Preserving critical user experiences.

Identity Authentication Solution

Identity Authentication supports such scenarios allowing customers to add their deprecation trial tokens so that they are sent via an HTTP header. This ensures that Identity Authentication customers with custom domains can use the deprecation trial for those domains respectively. The field to input the token is situated on the same place in the Identity Authentication admin console, where the custom domains are configured:
 

We will update this article if new updates or scenarios that we have not covered appear.

entry.title: Re: Unable to create a Decision in Build process automation
entry.content:
Hi,

You will need to add some rule to decision.

Did you follow this tutorial : https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-create-decision.html

or you can also check help portal : https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/create-decision

Regards,

Manish

i have tried all option mentioned this Installation process but always Error

To install this TestDrive you have to accept
the SAP COMMUNITY DEVELOPER License (DEV).

User's response to the accept license prompt = 'yes'

/dev/sda1 on /boot/efi type vfat (rw,relatime,fmask=0022,dmask=0022,codepage=437,iocharset=iso8859-1,shortname=mixed,utf8,errors=remount-ro)
tmpfs on /run/user/1000 type tmpfs (rw,nosuid,nodev,relatime,size=1613820k,nr_inodes=403455,mode=700,uid=1000,gid=100,inode64)
gvfsd-fuse on /run/user/1000/gvfs type fuse.gvfsd-fuse (rw,nosuid,nodev,relatime,user_id=1000,group_id=100)
tracefs on /sys/kernel/debug/tracing type tracefs (rw,nosuid,nodev,noexec,relatime)
binfmt_misc on /proc/sys/fs/binfmt_misc type binfmt_misc (rw,nosuid,nodev,noexec,relatime)
/dev/sdb1 on /run/media/roheel79/OPENSUSE-LE type vfat (rw,nosuid,nodev,relatime,uid=1000,gid=100,fmask=0022,dmask=0022,codepage=437,iocharset=iso8859-1,shortname=mixed,showexec,utf8,flush,errors=remount-ro,uhelper=udisks2)

Filesystem Size Used Avail Use% Mounted on

tmpfs 7.7G 4.0K 7.7G 1% /dev/shm

VERSION="15.5"

* ls -ld / /sybase /usr/sap /sapmnt
drwxr-xr-x 1 root root 180 Apr 5 12:10 /
drwxr-xr-x 1 root root 6 Sep 6 2019 /sapmnt

++++ Support data section END ++++
All logs have been written to the file /home/roheel79/abaptrial/ABAP/install_2024-04-08_10-32-15.log
Please see readme.html to find out how to get help

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

can someone help me in installation or share his VM file.  roheel79  (  at  ) gmail.com

entry.title: Re: How to create a Transaction Variant?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am not really experienced with transaction variants, but as far as I know using a transaction variant is not possible with selection screens (however, in all explanations and guides to transaction variants I can not find this information...?). Transaction WE02 uses a selection screen where MB21 uses a Dynpro. So this could explain the difference.

Kind regards

Jan

entry.title: How to dynamically set the metaPath in an xml fragment?
entry.content:
Hello,

What is the correct syntax for dynamically setting the 'metapath' in an xml fragment for a dynamically created page?

For a little context, I have a Fiori application based on an oData V4 service that I extended with a dynamic object page (using flexible programming model), and I'm having issues setting the metapath in the xml fragment. 
Hardcoding the metapath ("_association/@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.LineItem") works fine, but I need to dynamically set it.
This is the way it's currently set: 

    <macros:Table
        id="MasterDataTableID"
        metaPath="{ path: `${RapEntityAssociation}/@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.LineItem` }"
        readOnly="true"
        selectionMode="Multi"
        enableFullScreen="true"
        type="ResponsiveTable"
        personalization="Sort,Filter">
    </macros:Table>

entry.title: Re: ATP Customizing Disappeared
entry.content:
Hi @stefan1986 

See the note 2267745 - S4TWL - New advanced ATP in SAP S/4HANA, on-premise edition – Table VBBS. Aggregated ATP quantities have been removed in S/4HANA.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Norway has per diems with different currencies from 1.1.2024.
entry.content:
We have an issue with Norway who has now different per diem currencies from 1.1.2024. It's not about travel expenses, those it's clear that there are currency conversions. It really is per diems. For example, for Finland it's 102 EUR but for Sweden it's 941 SEK, for Iceland it's ISK, for Australia it's AUD, and so on.

Until now, per diems have always been NOK. What's the way to manage these in SAP? I haven't seen any OSS note or similar to solve. We don't have S4HANA or Concur.

entry.title: Re: AI Core - problem with copying object from AWS to /mnt/models
entry.content: Hi! As all your endpoints are working except for the model, I am assuming that you specify the bearer token and the default group correctly. Are you sure you are providing the correct input data in your json to make a prediction? Is the json formatted correctly? Is the endpoint specified correctly (/v2/predict if you followed the tutorial)? Are you using a POST request?

entry.title: Re: sap business one account nature
entry.content:
Just to add to my previous reply

There is no differentiation on technical side and for B1, between Account Type 'liability' and 'asset'.

The differentiation is between Accounts that belong to Balance Sheet , and apart, Accounts related to Profit and Loss (the Expenses and Sales). Serving to either the Balance Sheet or The Profit and Loss Report

The behavior on the automatic posting in debit or credit, in positive or negative sign, when applicable, will not be affected by the position in one or another drawer, it depends on the GL Account Determination set for the Business Partner, Item, Warehouse, etc when used in a certain Business Process (a Purchase, a Sales, etc).

When you create a Manual Journal Entry outside any business process for which there is a GL Account Determination, you can select any GL account (Balance, Sales, Expenses) or even a subledger account, and post in positive or negative sign, in credit or in debit at user discretion.

entry.title: Re: 🇷🇴 Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA (Timisoara, RO)
entry.content:
Is there a special room designated for the event?
The map pin on this site mentions one building and the department link in the description mentions another.

entry.title: Re: ServiceLayer post Picklist update error - 1470000838...
entry.content:
Hi mgregur,

According to SAP Note 1947547, you need to first allocate the batch numbers to sales order and then update the picklist.

Also, check SAP Note 3131177 for few scenarios.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: How to Retrieve Key Performance Metrics from SAP ASE / Sybase Instances?
entry.content:
I want to fetch important performance metrics from SAP ASE/Sybase databases. These include:

  1. Percent of lock used
  2. Percent of active connections
  3. Heap Memory Utilization %
  4. Memory Utilization %
  5. Disk Utilization % by Logical Disk

I've looked into Sybase's built-in monitoring tables, but couldn't find these specific metrics there.

Can anyone suggest a way to help me gather this information from multiple Sybase databases? I've searched around but haven't found a clear solution yet.

Any tips or advice would be greatly appreciated! Thanks!

entry.title: Date filter in GHG Recording - SAP Sustainability Control Tower
entry.content:
Hí!

Hello!

I think the date filter label doesn't update well in the Spanish language. If we filter by January in the GHG Recording, a year prior to the selected one appears on the label (2022 instead of 2023). However, I think it is filtering properly.

 

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: ATP Customizing Disappeared
entry.content:
Hi @DominikTylczyn , in this note is mentioned that this functionality has been deactivated with HANA 2015 or 2017. But in our HANA Version 2020 we still had this possibility.

In HANA 2022 is no possiblity to change somewehere these fields (first 3) but the table TMVF has these fields without possibility to change them...

entry.title: Re: ATP Customizing Disappeared
entry.content: so still not understandable...

entry.title: Dynamic Date Selection - SM13
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to delete the SM13(Update Requests) using report RSM13001 older than 45days. 

But in selection screen I can see Selection Variable "D"  is not supported. only I can see "T"

Can you please help me to find out the way how to give the dynamic date for deletion.

 

attached the screenshot.

 

Thanks

Sravan


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Date Selection - SM13
entry.content:
Hello,

s from kernel 781 you can use parameter "rdisp/vb_watchdog/cleanup   FREQUENCY=24H"

"This parameter can be used to configure the update watchdog for cleanup of old update requests. It is assigned a value f > 0. The watchdog then runs every f seconds.
The main task of the watchdog is to delete update requests older than the duration in days specified by parameter rdisp/vbdelete. After this duration has expired, the update requests are deleted irrespective of their status. If the parameter rdisp/vbdelete has the value 0, the watchdog runs but no requests are deleted. "

Kind regards,
SAP Product Support

entry.title: Dependents' National ID validation
entry.content:
Has anyone come up with a way to determine if the national ID entered inside the dependent details matches any existing one in the system? i.e. to know which related employees are working in the same company and they declare each other in the system, so it must change a field flag to Yes. 

I understand that the standard validation is there but it seems to only work during hire/rehire. It is currently enabled but if i add a dependent at any point in time, it doesnt get flagged by the standard validation.

entry.title: Email Template s/4 Hana cloud with FICA
entry.content:
I'm trying to assign my email Template to be used by the system when a customer renew/buy a new subscription. However, Sap is keep using the standard email Template.

This is what I've done:

  • Created the template via "Maintain email templates" app.
  • Assigned the template to the invoice via "Assign email templates" in customizing.
  • Assigned the email template via "Define Form Template for Correspondence" in customizing for FI-CA invoice.

Any Idea what I'm doing wrong here?

entry.title: Re: Can I delete any Resource line from product tree by S...
entry.content:
Dear Ankit CHAUHAN,

Thanks a lot. I will check the post.

But what about deleting any line from product tree?

Regards,

Mucip:)

entry.title: Re: ServiceLayer post Picklist update error - 1470000838...
entry.content:
Dear @ANKIT_CHAUHAN ,

 

thank you, but scenarios in SAP note 3131177 are referencing a situation when you already have allocations for that Picklist. I am trying to create a Picklist via IF and no allocation is accepted. I have allocated the batches to the Sales order but it still does not allow any allocation via IF.

 

BR,

Matija

entry.title: Re: Exploring SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI: A Comprehensive Review
entry.content: We have set this up and it works like a charm. I came across your fine blog in search for a solution regarding the SNC Names. We don't want to provide to thousands of users an SNC Name through SU01, since this is a tedious operation. Due to the fact that a mapping based on (obviously a variable) email-address is used, report RSUSR300 doesn't seem to be useful here. So we looked at transaction CERTRULE, which @Colt also mentions. But... Isn't CERTRULE only meant for HTTPS-traffic? It doesn't seem to work with SAP Logon / SAP GUI via SNC.

entry.title: Re: Problem in performance calculations in PMGM
entry.content:
Hi there,

1. " we convert percentage achievement in goals to scale 1 to 5, based on a conversion criteria defined in an excel sheet. The problem we are encountering is that when average achievement of goals by an employee is between 95 and 110, everything seems fine. But other than this range, things get messy. The conversion is not done correctly. "
>>Do you mean when normalizing from one scale to another scale based on your custom conversion formula, it  does not work as expected? Are you using custom calculation rules defined in goal plan xml or are you manually inputting the goal rating after completing percentage achievement in excel?

As a reference on normalizing scores from one scale to another, here is an example of how sfsf normalizes scores :Overall performance rating scale is 1 -3; Competency section rating scale is 1 - 5 and the competency section rating is 4. Then the competency rating will be calculated in overall rating following the below formula: (((rating - original min)/(original max - original min)) * (new max - new min)) + new min ((4-1)/(5-1))*(3-1)) + 1 = 2.5

2. For the alternate approach you described, unfortunately summary section does not support configuring custom fields. You might consider configuring a custom section either above or below the summary section. Within this custom section, you could create a custom field to capture the desired data.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: ServiceLayer post Picklist update error - 1470000838...
entry.content:
Hi mgregur,

What about a Postman test?

Have you managed to get it work using Postman?

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Exploring SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI: A Comprehensive Review
entry.content:
Hi Henk, you are right, certrule is only for ICM-based access (ICF-Services) based on X.509 certs (mTLS). Besides RSUSR300 (SNC1) you may want to use custom ABAPs, own tools/logic, IDM, Xiting XAMS etc. to automate SNC user mapping which is still required for SAP GUI (SNC).
Cheers Colt

entry.title: Re: Solution Z_SOLUTION_US finishes checking with errors
entry.content: Go to SCC4 and set "CATT and eCATT Restriction" to an "X - eCATT and CATT allowed " for your Best Practices Client.

entry.title: Re: Can I delete any Resource line from product tree by S...
entry.content:
Hi mucipilbuga,

Question: But what about deleting any line from product tree?

Answer: Header B1S-ReplaceCollectionsOnPatch=true will enable you to do that. The explanation was provided in that reference only.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: ServiceLayer post Picklist update error - 1470000838...
entry.content:
Postman gives the same error... Below is the PATCH payload:

{
"PickListsLines": [
{
"LineNumber": 0,
"OrderEntry": 643,
"OrderRowID": 1,
"ReleasedQuantity": 0,
"PickedQuantity": 2,
"PreviouslyReleasedQuantity": 2,
"BaseObjectType": 17,
"DocumentLinesBinAllocations": [
{
"BinAbsEntry": 16440,
"Quantity": 2,
"SerialAndBatchNumbersBaseLine": -1,
"BaseLineNumber": 0
}
]
},
{
"LineNumber": 1,
"OrderEntry": 643,
"OrderRowID": 0,
"ReleasedQuantity": 0,
"PickedQuantity": 2,
"PreviouslyReleasedQuantity": 2,
"BaseObjectType": 17,
"BatchNumbers": [
{
"BatchNumber": "2110545073200",
"ItemCode": "10013933",
"SystemSerialNumber": 618,
"Quantity": 1
},
{
"BatchNumber": "126411",
"ItemCode": "10013933",
"SystemSerialNumber": 619,
"Quantity": 1
}
],
"DocumentLinesBinAllocations": [
{
"BinAbsEntry": 16440,
"Quantity": 1,
"SerialAndBatchNumbersBaseLine": 0,
"BaseLineNumber": 1
},
{
"BinAbsEntry": 16440,
"Quantity": 1,
"SerialAndBatchNumbersBaseLine": 1,
"BaseLineNumber": 1
}
]
}
]
}

entry.title: How to avoid screen freeze after error message throw in BADI_MATERIAL_CHECK
entry.content:
When we implement the validation for some fields for MM01/MM02 with the help of BADI BADI_MATERIAL_CHECK, and throw error message then screen gets freeze and we are unable to modify and give the correct value. Then, how to avoid such scenario.

This scenario can be avoided by adding the exception 'APPLICATION_ERROR' while throwing the message like below.

MESSAGE 'message_text' TYPE  'E' RAISING APPLICATION_ERROR.

This helps to avoid the screen freeze.

Thank you!

entry.title: Manage work center capacity for maintenance order
entry.content:
Dear,

When implementing SAP Asset Management S/4HANA Public Edition for a client, one of the requests is the following: being able to check the capacities available of a work center before assigning hours to an operation.

I know that there is the Work Center Utilization app via the license Resource Scheduling (43R) but we want to know if there is an equivalent to check the capacities without this license.

I have found a Production tile: Manage Work Center Capacity. I have defined, in My Area Of Responsibility, a work center group that I have created by including my maintenance work center in it.

The issue that I have is that I do not see the percentage of the utilization of my maintenance operations, yet I cannot see the work planned (see my pictures attached) > the utilization is empty for my work center RES-0100; Capacities are available in the header of my work center & my maintenance order operations are either ready to schedule or dispatched already.

Can you please help and let me know if there is a configuration missing or another alternative to check capacity planning without the Resource Scheduling app?

Thank you,

Dany R.

entry.title: Re: Integration possibilities from SAP CI(Integration Sui...
entry.content:
Hello Farooq, 

The information in KBA 3367596 FAQ: SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity (MBC), may be of interest to you. 

Regards
Mark

entry.title: Re: ATP Customizing Disappeared
entry.content:
Hi @stefan1986 

The aggregates are removed from the very early releases of S/4HANA, I guess from the first release even - see the simplification item:

The fact that SUMAU and SUMLF are still there in the TMVF or that you could maintain them in the ATP configuration doesn't mean that the corresponding functionality is still there.

The bottom line is that ATP in S/4HANA doesn't use aggregates even if the corresponding settings are still there.

Cheers

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Practical Insights into New Features of SAP EWM in S/4HANA 2023
entry.content: @JivcKlog True - despite all the efforts S/4HANA EWM is still more embedded than integrated. But SAP is moving into the right direction. Maybe one day EWM will get as integrated as LE-WM currently is.

BPI-SIG-PN to get further assistance.

entry.title: Re: Working with maintenance checklists in SAP
entry.content:
Hi there,

I am only aware of one Checklist solution in SAP Asset Management, which is perfectly explained here:

Set up your SAP S/4HANA system for EAM Inspection ... - SAP Community

I hope, that helps.

Nicole

entry.title: Re: Do we have a certificate for datasphere? thanks ~
entry.content:
Hi @NanWang 
We currently do not provide an SAP Datasphere Certification. 
You can explore our current offerings on the SAP Certification portfolio site. 
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Update time dependent condition from info record to s...
entry.content:
Hello,

Unfortunately it is not possible to change the scheduling agreement price conditions automatically when you change the price conditions in info record.

Please check note 2117271 - Scheduling agreement price update from info record - SAP ERP & SAP S/4HANA. - SAP for Me

Regards,

Rita

entry.title: Re: auto. payment: bill of exchange
entry.content: This is a wrong answer, SAP provides config to post BOE payments through F110.

entry.title: Re: AI Core - problem with copying object from AWS to /mnt/models
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for the quick reply!

I used JSON provided in the tutorial; it didn’t require any adjustments as I understood as well as endpoints (it was ready to be copied).

However, I don’t think data structure is the problem because it seems like the model is not even loaded, so the error appears before it comes to use input data. In my test scenario I am sending empty requests (tried GET and POST too).

As I understand, the key point to identify the reason, is to be sure if my piece of code reading folders and files in ./ directory should work and the model (or /mnt which is hardcoded part of the model path) should be visible there. If so, the log suggesting that model was successfully copied is not correct?

Please correct me if my reasoning is wrong.

 

Regards

entry.title: Re: TM Cost Distrubution for ICPO Scenarios
entry.content:
Hi Munja,
you need to follow the Oss note 2146545.

regards

Rogerio

entry.title: Which Nuts Are Considered the Best for Diabetics?
entry.content: Nuts are a powerhouse of nutrients, offering a variety of health benefits. For individuals managing diabetes, incorporating nuts into their diet can be particularly beneficial due to their low glycemic index and high nutritional value. However, not all nuts are created equal when it comes to managing blood sugar levels. In this article, we will explore which nuts are considered the best for diabetics and why they are recommended. Fildena 100

entry.title: Inventory level hierarchy
entry.content:
Hi All,

Is there a query in SAP that can retrospectively show the inventory level of a location/plant not only on a monthly (MC.5) basis, but also on a weekly or daily basis?

Thank you in advance for your answers!

Regards

Zsolt

entry.title: Text Color Not working
entry.content:
as you can see i put text component and change color into red.
but on SAP Buld app (android) and Web Preview display text black color

entry.title: Re: Machines grouping in work centers for Textile Industry
entry.content:
Hi,

Welcome to the world of Implementing SAP for Textiles. With multiple textile implementation i could not find any direct solution in SAP , So i have always customized this with a "Custom screen" to capture the order confirmation with Order number, Qty and split no or Individual capacity to capture this .

Will be equally interested to know if you find some solution in standard.  

Also is this for the Spinning Operation confirmation ?

Br,

dsk

entry.title: Re: ABAP Call Monitor (SCMON) – Analyze usage of your code
entry.content:
Hi,

We have been running SCMON & SUSG on production environment for the last 1.5 years, and discovered in de Cust Mig App it is showing objects not in scope, but were still in use!
What could be the cause?

Although the app is running on the free BTP Abap tier, we doubt this is the cause, but we think it is the logging.

What we have discovered, is that our Solution Manager (still) was running it's jobs too, but running Usage Procedure Logging (UPL) . 

Could this be the cause? I've read the warnings not running this is in parallel, but couldn't find the consequences.

entry.title: Text component bugs
entry.content:
On Designer how like this

 


but on Preview (Web) and mobile SAP Build app (Android) show below

entry.title: Re: Custom code adaptation for SAP S/4HANA - FAQ
entry.content:
Hi,

We have been running SCMON & SUSG on production environment for the last 1.5 years, and discovered in de Cust Mig App it is showing objects not in scope, but were still in use!
What could be the cause?

Although the app is running on the free BTP Abap tier, we doubt this is the cause, but we think it is the logging.

What we have discovered, is that our Solution Manager (still) was running it's jobs too, but running Usage Procedure Logging (UPL) . 

Could this be the cause? I've read the warnings not running these is in parallel, but couldn't find the consequences.

entry.title: Re: Assign a user to the cell in SAP SAC
entry.content:
Commenting in a cell (not a column) does work, but assining users with @ apparentyl is not supported .... 😕 ...

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/commenting-in-sap-analytics-cloud/ba-p/13355571

entry.title: Re: Incorrect accouting entries in Partial settlement doc...

entry.title: Re: AI Core - problem with copying object from AWS to /mnt/models
entry.content:
Can you see the model in your artifacts?

Sorry for not understanding but have you tried the GET model endpoint: <your deployment url> + "/v2/greet"? And specify the resource group as well as the Bearer token?

entry.title: how to find all types of VL03N->Header Details->Conditions
entry.content:
Hi, experts
how to find all types of VL03N->Header Details->Conditions
and add a new one ?

entry.title: Re: Integration Center demo for the Compensation Module
entry.content:
Great post @xavierlegarrec .

I am current working on a similar scenario and need your guidance. Below is the case:

I am publishing a custom rating field from Comp worksheet to a string field (let us call as LTI rating) in custom MDF object - This is all fine.

Post publish, I want the rating to flow from MDF to the standard SysOverallCompetency background element. Below is the IC job screenshot.

Issues:

1. I can't see the Label field in SysOverallCompetency which actually holds the rating value. How can I enable label field in IC?

2. I mapped the LTI rating field from MDF to Name field from SysOverallCompetency, after running the job error is thrown that Data type mismatch for rating field. 

 

Any idea how to fix it?

Many thanks,

Swagatika

entry.title: SAP Community Datasphere
entry.content:
I have been contributing to the Datashpere community for a few years now. As one of the users of the first version od DSP, having participated in betas such as Data Flows, I have tried to help all those who had doubts about the product, and of course, I have also asked for advice when I was the one who did not have something clear.

I believe that the community is something very powerful, but this new version makes me lose a lot of time, time that I lend voluntarily.

In the previous version I logged in every day, it was part of my routine at work, which made me appear for many months as top 1 datasphere contributors in the old community.

But now, the obstacles that have been put to write a simple post, to comment answers in a thread or to do a simple search complicate its use.

Write a post

I enter the community by filtering by the tag "SAP Datasphere" ... something already rare (there is no group, folder or channel, only a tag), and I want to write a post and it makes me choose the "location".

WTF ... a lot of SAP Successfactors boards??. Mental note: leave DSP and learn SSFF, they even have groups!!!
Ok, remember where is the group where you write about datasphere ... yes, look in others, google it, ... ok, under "Products and Technology" > "Technology" > "Technology Q&A".  Mental note: for next time forget about datasphere, remember you are a technologist with questions and answers, so ... it's easy. 

Discuss

When someone asks a question and you answer it, many times there is a discussion about it, and you have to write several messages with the "Comment" option ... which allows you to enter a line of text, where you will write your answer comfortably, right? 

Have you tried mentioning someone in a comment? or using bold? or quote?... you can't.
Use notepad or open another window and type in a new post then copy and paste into the tiny reply box.

All this makes the job much easier, doesn't it?

Search for knowledge

Ok, I have a question and I want to see if anyone has asked about this topic. It is about how to UPDATE a table using a flow. Well you can't, but I'm looking for people who are interested in this topic, to ask them to vote for my "cutomer influence idea" to support it (please vote here) 

Go to seach box, select Q&A and write "update flow"

to much generic, not for datasphere ... it seems that the search does not take into account that I was using the datasphere tag on the page, ... add datasphere

did you mean atmosphere? ... SAP please add technical terms to index.

Ok, 1000 results, to much for me, How can I filter from the results the ones posted with the datasphere tag (which are the ones I am interested in)? I, at least, have not known how to do it.

 

 

These are just a few examples of things that at least in my case I used to do every day, now they become more complicated and difficult, and requiere more time (more of my time), for something that we do voluntary.

I just hope that someone from SAP DSP sees this and talks it over with those who manage the community, because in my opinion the increase in DSP adoption by customers and partners, is not reflected in the usage of the DSP community.

At least in my case, it doesn't motivate me to log in as often as it used to.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Batch Management/Batch Determination
entry.content:
Hi @RajTilak54 

Go to your production order > Component in change mode and perform this , This will help you to understand more details. If you can perform this and share screen shot, we can analyze it .

entry.title: Build SAP BTP cockpit view in SAP UI5 - master detail detail layout
entry.content:
HI all, 

Lets try to build an app in SAPUI5 that resembles SAP BTP Cockpit. 

Lets first find all UI5 control used in it. 

Overall architecture is master-detail-detail. 

Master-detail is achieved with the use of SAPUI5 control - sap.tnt library

There are 3 parts in TnT Library. 

Check out this Link  - TnT Library layout 

  • Header                     Top most
  • Side Navigation.       Left most
  • Bread crumbs.          Top 
  • Main Content.           middle
